subject: core/tracker/rutor/src/main/kotlin/lava/tracker/rutor/http/RuTorHttpClient.kt
test_method: semaphore bounds concurrent requests at exactly 4 in flight
contract: RuTorHttpClient must serialize all outgoing HTTP calls behind a Semaphore(permits = 4); under load the MockWebServer must observe at most 4 in-flight requests at any one time.

rehearsal.mutation: Changed Semaphore(permits = 4) to Semaphore(permits = 100) in RuTorHttpClient.kt
rehearsal.observed_failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Max in-flight observed must be <= 4 (semaphore bound), was 12

notes: The mutation forced 12 of 12 dispatched requests to overlap at the MockWebServer dispatcher; the assertTrue produced the failure with a clear message naming both the bound and the observed value. After revert, the semaphore re-imposes the 4-permit cap and the test passes. The rehearsal therefore proves the test is wired through the production code path and is genuinely sensitive to a regression that removes the bound. Subsequent SP-3a sections must not relax this test or its bound without re-running the rehearsal and updating this evidence file.
